content: Liangwei Yang is a master student majored in Computer Science, supervised by Tao Zhou and Hui Gao. His research interests include Artificial Intelligence, Data Mining, Complex Networks and Reinforcement Learning. He currently studies in the Big Data Research Center, and develop novel models to deal with problems related to biology data
